Subject: Reminder about Project Showcase
Body: Dear Students, This is a gentle reminder about the upcomingВ Project Showcase, scheduled forВ 21st October 2024. This event provides an excellent opportunity for you to present your innovative projects to industry leaders and faculty members, with a chance to win exciting prizes.As a reminder,В project submissions are due by 10th October 2024. We encourage all interested students to approach the relevant Track Chair as soon as possible to discuss your project ideas. Each track has limited seats (maximum of 30), and spots are filling up quickly. Tracks will be closed once the seats are filled, even if that occurs before the official deadline, so donвҖҷt miss out on securing your spot!Below is the list of tracks, along with the corresponding Track Chair and contact details:оғ»оғ»TrackTrack ChairTrack Chair EmailTrack Chair Cabin NumberAI & Data ScienceDr. Umesh Guptaumesh.gupta@bennett.edu.inM-316, Third FloorDr. Aditya Bhardwajaditya.bhardwaj@bennett.edu.inM-302, Third FloorSoftware & AutomationDr. Deepika Pantoladeepika.pantola@bennett.edu.inM-34, First floorDr. Debjani Ghoshdebjani.ghosh@bennett.edu.inM-154, First FloorOpen InnovationDr. Anuj Kumar Bhartianuj.bharti@bennett.edu.inM-36, First FloorBlockchain & Cyber SecurityDr. Vimal Kumarvimal.kumar@bennett.edu.inM-12, First FloorEngineering & Applied ScienceDr. Abuzar Sayeedabuzar.sayeed@bennett.edu.inM-3, First FloorA separate track is reserved forВ SCSET Clubs & Chapters, and details will be conveyed to their respective leaders.Key Guidelines:Projects must be fully functional, innovative, and demonstrate originality.Team Size -В 2-6 Members.Limited seatsВ are available for each track, so students should visit the Track Chair's office as soon as possible.TheВ final deadline for project submissionsВ isВ 10th October 2024.Winners will be selected per track, and there will be two additional awards:Best All-Girl TeamSustainable Development Goal AwardWe look forward to seeing your creative projects come to life at the Project Showcase!Regards,Student Cabinet 2024-25School of CSETBennett UniversityВ Get Outlook for Android

Body: Dear Students,The last date for registration is tomorrow, Sunday, at 3:00 PM IST.MuditВ Sent from Outlook for AndroidFrom: Mudit Sachdeva <mudit.sachdeva@bennett.edu.in>Sent: Friday, October 4, 2024 9:51:00 amTo: CSE 2021 <cse2021@bennett.edu.in>; BCA 2022 <bca2022@bennett.edu.in>Cc: Rakesh Singh <rakesh.singh@bennett.edu.in>; Neha Maheshwari <neha.maheshwari@bennett.edu.in>; Nitin Sood <Nitin.Sood@bennett.edu.in>; Naushad K H <Naushad.H@bennett.edu.in>; Varun sharma <varun.sharma@bennett.edu.in>; Pargat Singh <Pargat.Singh@bennett.edu.in>; Pallavi Mehta <Pallavi.Mehta@bennett.edu.in>; Abhay Bansal <abhay.bansal@bennett.edu.in>; Tapas Badal <tapas.badal@bennett.edu.in>; Bharat Gupta <bharat.gupta@bennett.edu.in>; Deepak Rai <deepak.rai@bennett.edu.in>; Sumit Badotra <Sumit.Badotra@bennett.edu.in>; Revati Jain <revati.jain@bennett.edu.in>; Ajith Abraham <Ajith.Abraham@bennett.edu.in>; Senthil Kumar <senthil.kumar@bennett.edu.in>; Rishabh Attri <rishabh.attri@bennett.edu.in>; Ankush Goyal <ankush.goyal@bennett.edu.in>Subject: Internship & PlacementВ  Opportunity || JTP ||В  Btech 2025 Batch | Minimum Package 24+LPA || JapanВ Dear Students,В About the company:В JTPВ is a listed company on Japanese Stock exchangeВ as JTP 2488.В Our portfolio encapsulates services and products in ROBOTICS, Hardware / Software development, Pharma and Human resource development. Our head office is in Japan with branch offices in USA, India, Korea, and many other countries. JTP has over 35 years of experience in the Japanese market. We work with clients such as EMC, SAP, Hitachi, NVIDIA, Softbank, Mitsubishi etc.https://www.jtp.co.jp/en/В В Campus Code : 2025V2Bennett (please ask the students to enter correct campus code) while registeringВ Link : https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVKSwvyQzyz-vind1-1pJH8wP8t_5qZZ7b6xpBGJd-kSbRHQ/viewformВ For StepВ 1В In the google form students will be asked information regarding their knowledge of technologies and would need to attach project links. Student should be prepared with all the project links beforehand and enter them in the correct section of technology. Please make sure students are filling in genuine information that is verified by the placement office.В If the information regarding projects done is found to be fraudulent the student will be instantly removed from the process. Students have to enter their campus code in the google form which is mentioned below.В В В Note the following points.Please note information once provided cannot be changed during the entire process of hiring which includes information such as email id, phone number, name (as per government documents), etc.В Kindly provide the links of relevant projects / certificates where ever required.Kindly note this job opportunity is not for India. The job location is Japan.В Please note this opportunity has a mandatory, non-negotiable 3-year service bond.В The following opportunity is only for Indian nationality students only, even if the applicant is studying and living in India but holds a foreign passport, such an application will not be considered.В If students from your campus have participated in the first cycle, and eliminated during interview round or Virtual Training round, these students are not eligible. Make sure they DO NOT register again.В В В Job role:В SystemВ engineerВ The hiring processВ willВ beВ asВ follows:В Step 1:В Application.В Step 2:В Selection for technical assessments.В Step 3:В TechnicalВ assessment**.В (Compulsory to be conducted in campus) Step 4: English InterviewВ (Please note students with insufficient international level English skills will be eliminated. Students with Mother Toung influence will be eliminated)В Step 5:В Virtual Training + Project round.В Step 6:В Golden ticket opportunity for few students*В Step 7: CEOВ panelВ Interview.В Step 8: PlacementВ in Japan with 24 LPA+Eligible batch: 2025 Graduating.Eligibility branches: CS,В IT,В EC,В E&TC,В MCA,В BCA.EligibilityВ criterion: All students who are passionate for IT. (No merit criterion)В В ** There mayВ beВ oneВ orВ moreВ additionalВ roundsВ before Virtual trainingВ and during the virtual training, depending on the difficulty of the project in the Virtual Training.В *Golden ticket opportunity for 2025 batch.Few lucky students will get a chance to do aВ LIVE INTERNSHIP IN JAPANВ post the virtual training round.В If selected by JTP or our partnering companies, student will get a fully paid internship in Japan. This internship will be for 15 days. Cost of travel, stay, food will be taken care by the companyRegards,Mudit SachdevaВ |В Industry RelationsBennett UniversityGreater Noida 201310, Uttar Pradesh, Indiahttps://www.bennett.edu.in/Email:В mudit.sachdeva@bennett.edu.inTel: В  +91-8839441583В В В В В В В В В

Subject: Re: INTERNSHIP & FULL TIME PLACEMENT OPPORTUNITY || LUMINOUS POWER TECHNOLOGIES || BTECH CSE 2025 & 2026.
Body: Dear Students,Luminous is excited about the initial shortlisting. Today they shared important insights for the second and third round. Everyone is euphoric in a creating a wonderful success story.В The next few days are all about the PPT presentation. Let me know if you need help to focus only on the PPT.В Stipend and Salary: The stipend offered during the internship is between вӮ№50,000 and вӮ№60,000 per month. If converted to full-time, the salary offered is an attractive вӮ№12 LPA.Second Round (PPT Submission): The next step is to submit a 2-page PPTВ on Unstop. This is a crucial part of the selection process, so make sure your presentation is clear and concise.Third Round (Problem Statement): For the third round, you will need to articulate the provided problem statement in a 10-page document. The problem requires some computations and analysis, as Luminous prefers a data-driven approachВ in your solution.You are encouraged to explore open-source resources, but itвҖҷs advisable to use the dummy data provided by the Luminous teamВ for consistency. You can request this data by reaching out to Unstop supportВ at support@unstop.com.Make sure to put in your best effort at each stage, and donвҖҷt hesitate to seek assistance if needed. revolution as the country's premier AI services provider. As a bridge between cutting-edge artificial intelligence and practical business applications, we offer a comprehensive suite of services including custom AI solution development, high-quality data annotation and AI model evaluation.В We pride ourselves on our speedy delivery and multilingual proficiency, enabling AI solutions across diverse landscapes, and our commitment to quality. Join us as we ride the wave of AI innovation, aggregating intelligence and accelerating growth to power India's technological future. https://www.greenridertech.com/ В Job Title - Prompt Engineer (Generalist) CTC : 4LPA - 6LPA Location Joining - ImmediateLocation - Gurgaon, HaryanaType - Full Time Department - AI/ML DivisionВ Hiring Process Round 1: English and Critical thinking proficiency test will be conducted at the Campus by the GRT team, followed by an Group Discussion/HR interactionRound 2: Selected candidates will be notified and given a secondary assessment Round 3: Candidates who would successfully qualify this assessment would further be called for a personal interview at company PremisesВ Job Description: This opportunity is for freshers who want to confidently dabble with the world of technology and be a part of the larger AI revolution that is taking the world by a storm. We are looking for generalists who can use their existing language and critical thinking skills to work as a Prompt Engineer and help train these Large Language Models. В Do not let these technology jargons confuse you, if selected, we will extensively train you to become a Prompt Engineer before you will be responsible for designing and optimizing prompts for AI language models. *Prompt Engineering is the process of creating instructions(prompts) that can be understood by a generative AI model. Subject: Fine-tune GPT-4o for Object Detection
Body: GPT-4o fine-tuning for object detection, livestream showing how to fine-tune GPT-4o, and how to train YOLOv11 on custom data!How to Fine-Tune GPT-4o for Object DetectionOn October 1st, 2024, OpenAI announced support for fine-tuning GPT-4o with vision capabilities. This allows you to customize a version of GPT-4o specifically for tasks where the base model might struggle, such as accurately identifying objects in complex scenes or recognizing subtle visual patterns. While GPT-4o demonstrates impressive general vision capabilities, fine-tuning allows you to enhance its performance for niche or specialized applications. In this guide, you will learn how to fine-tune GPT-4o using a playing card dataset. READ GUIDE Livestream: Fine-tune GPT-4o for Object DetectionJoin today, October 3, for a live coding session at 11:30am EST! The Roboflow team has experimented extensively with fine-tuning models, and we are excited to share how we trained GPT-4o, and how you can train your own GPT-4o vision model for object detection. Object detection is a task that the base GPT-4o model finds challenging without fine-tuning. Following along as we walk through using an example notebook that you can use to fine-tune OpenAI GPT-4o on any object detection dataset, or with minor modifications, on any image-text dataset.В  JOIN STREAM Train a YOLOv11 Model with Custom DataLaunched on September 27, 2024, YOLOv11 is a computer vision model that you can use for a wide variety of tasks, from object detection to segmentation to classification.
